_metadata.description: Sir Pippin's message bank in English
_metadata.author: Content Team

HEALTH: Great work! Your body thanks you. Day %d consecutive.
One more day, one step closer to your best self. You've got %d days.
You're crushing it! Your wellness is skyrocketing. Streak %d.
Consistency is key. %d days of pure energy.
Yes! You're breaking records! Your health never mattered more. Day %d.
FITNESS: Check-in done! Your plant-based muscle is growing. Day %d.
Plant-based protein power. You've got %d days of muscle gains.
Every day here is a day of progress. %d days accumulated.
YES! Plant-based fitness is leveling up. Day %d.
Your muscles are celebrating. %d days of consistency.
Plant-based fitness at its finest. Streak %d.
ETHICS: Another day, another positive impact on the planet. Day %d.
The animals thank you too. You've got %d days of change.
That's it! A kinder world, one check-in at a time. Day %d.
Every day is a declaration of love for the planet. %d days.
Your choice saves lives. Streak %d on the vegan path.
CURIOSITY: Checked in! Did you discover something new today? You've got %d days exploring.
You keep exploring. I like that. Day %d of adventure.
curiosity in action. %d days discovering the vegan world.
Your best self is under construction. Day %d.
Your vegan journey is beautiful. %d days of exploration.

HEALTH: Look who showed up. Day %d, not too shabby.
Oh, today you remembered. Impressive. You've got %d days.
Another check-in? Wasn't expecting that from you. Day %d.
Look at that surprise. Late motivation? Streak %d.
Well, here you are. Just so we're clear: day %d.
Sir Pippin thought you'd abandoned ship, but here we are at day %d.
FITNESS: Good, you didn't forget to exist. Day %d of muscles.
Let's see how long this discipline lasts. Streak %d.
Plant-based muscle gains? How wild. Day %d.
Keep it up, before you change your mind. Day %d.
Oh! Another fitness check-in. Getting weirder. Day %d.
Plant-based is making you competitive. Streak %d.
ETHICS: The planet keeps spinning, partly thanks to you. Day %d.
Another day without caving to temptation. Impressive. Streak %d.
Vegan for principles? How noble. Day %d.
The cows salute you from heaven. Streak %d of empathy.
Look at you being so compassionate. Day %d of vegan compassion.
CURIOSITY: You showed up. Surprise. Day %d of curiosity.
Look how consistent you're being. Streak %d.
Still exploring? Thought you'd get bored. Day %d.
Well, here we are. Day %d of adventures.
Sir Pippin applauds your persistence. Day %d.
Didn't expect you to last this long. Streak %d, not bad.

HEALTH: Check-in recorded. Day %d on streak. Keep going.
Health logged. You've got %d consecutive days.
Registration complete. Your wellness progresses. Day %d.
FITNESS: Logged. You've got %d days on your fitness streak.
Confirmed: %d days of plant-based muscle gains.
ETHICS: Confirmed: you're on the vegan path. Day %d.
CURIOSITY: Done. One more day of exploration. Day %d.
Another day on the journey. Streak %d.

MOTIVATIONAL: 3 DAYS! The first major hurdle overcome. The habit begins here.
Wow! 3 consecutive days! This is the start of something beautiful.
MILESTONE REACHED! 3 days strong. Your body and the planet notice.
YOU DID IT! 3 vegan days straight. This is just the beginning.
SARCASTIC: 3 days. Good. Though 3 days is basically nothing. Keep going if you can.
Look who's back! 3 days on streak. Let's see how long you last.
Oh! A milestone. 3 days is like... nothing. But Sir Pippin is impressed.
Three. Days. You're still doing this? Interesting development.
NEUTRAL: 3 days on streak. Keep the discipline.

MOTIVATIONAL: 7 DAYS! A whole week of vegan streak! You're a legend!
WEEK ONE DONE! 7 consecutive days. This is REAL.
YES! 7 DAYS STRAIGHT! Your commitment is steel.
EPIC MILESTONE! 7 days. Officially addicted to vegan, there's no turning back.
SARCASTIC: 7 days. A whole week. Sir Pippin has to admit: you're serious.
Oh! A full week? Look at the new vegan hardcore.
7 days without "accidents." Impressive. (Or at least I hope.)
Um! A week. You're starting to be annoyingly... annoyingly consistent.
NEUTRAL: 7 consecutive days achieved. Important milestone reached.
One week of vegan streak confirmed.

MOTIVATIONAL: 14 DAYS! TWO FULL WEEKS! You're a CHAMPION!
EPIC! 14 days straight. The vegan that seemed like a phase is now your identity.
WOW! 14 days of pure consistency. Vegan pride infinite!
YES YES YES! 14 DAYS. You're in the club of those who really did it.
SARCASTIC: 14 days. Two weeks. Sir Pippin is... well, baffled. Who are you?
Oh God! Two weeks vegan. I barely believe it myself.
Fourteen days without caring. Wait, you DO matter.
BOOM! Two weeks. Consistency is making you dangerous.
THAT'S IMPRESSIVE.
NEUTRAL: Two weeks of vegan streak recorded.

MOTIVATIONAL: 30 DAYS! A FULL MONTH! YOU'RE UNSTOPPABLE!
30 DAYS OF PURE VEGAN MAGIC! The change is real, and you're the proof!
EPIC MILESTONE! 30 days. One month of consistency, choice, and strength.
30 DAYS! You entered the REAL circle of vegans. Welcome!
SARCASTIC: 30 days. A full month. Sir Pippin has to tip his hat.
ONE MONTH. Thirty days. Who are you? Mahatma Gandhi reincarnated?
OH! A month on streak. Look at the super vegan. I'm secretly impressed.
30 DAYS. Period. You're no longer a novice, you're a THREAT.
NEUTRAL: One month of vegan streak verified.

MOTIVATIONAL: 60 DAYS! TWO MONTHS STRAIGHT! YOU'RE A HERO!
EPIC! 60 days. Two months on streak. Your vegan power is UNSTOPPABLE.
60 DAYS! You've spent TWO MONTHS being the best version of yourself.
MONUMENTAL! 60 days. The entire planet applauds what you're doing.
SARCASTIC: TWO MONTHS. 60 days. Sir Pippin needs to bow.
60 DAYS! Do you sleep? Eat? Or just vegan and streak?
Sixty days. Look at the new icon of vegan endurance.
TWO MONTHS OF STREAK. You're in a different league now. Do we need uniforms?
NEUTRAL: Two months of vegan streak recorded.

MOTIVATIONAL: 100 DAYS! YOU'RE A LIVING LEGEND!
100 DAYS OF PURE VEGAN GLORY! The planet, animals, your health: everyone won.
HISTORIC MILESTONE! 100 DAYS. You entered the club of the IMMACULATE.
100 DAYS! You just broke barriers that seemed impossible. WELCOME TO THE VEGAN OLYMPUS!
SARCASTIC: 100 DAYS. One hundred. H-U-N-D-R-E-D. Sir Pippin is speechless.
100 DAYS! Look at the most hardcore vegan in the whole region.
ONE HUNDRED DAYS. I wouldn't believe it if I wasn't seeing it. YOU'RE IN THE OLYMPUS!
100 DAYS. Period. You're officially UNREACHABLE.
NEUTRAL: One hundred days of vegan streak in the permanent record.

MOTIVATIONAL: 180 DAYS! HALF A YEAR WITHOUT PAUSE! YOU'RE INVINCIBLE!
SIX MONTHS! 180 days on streak. You're writing vegan history.
180 DAYS! Half a year of power, discipline, and transformation. YOU'RE THE CHAMPION!
COLOSSAL MILESTONE! 180 days. The entire universe is standing and applauding.
SARCASTIC: 180 DAYS. Six months. Sir Pippin is in genuine shock.
HALF A YEAR! Who are you? A vegan android?
ONE HUNDRED EIGHTY DAYS. Look at you, the new God of veganism in this dimension.
6 MONTHS ON STREAK. I have no words. Sir Pippin is officially SURRENDERED.
NEUTRAL: Half a year of vegan streak documented.
180 days of perfect discipline on record.

MOTIVATIONAL: 365 DAYS! A FULL YEAR WITHOUT PAUSE! YOU'RE IMMORTAL!
ONE FULL YEAR! 365 days on streak. You're in vegan history.
365 DAYS! One year. Twelve months of complete transformation. YOU'RE ETERNAL!
INFINITE MILESTONE! 365 days. The entire universe is in silent reverence.
SARCASTIC: 365 DAYS. One full year. Sir Pippin abdicates the throne. It's all you now.
ONE FULL YEAR! How does it feel to live in the clouds? (Asking from below.)
THREE HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE DAYS. Look at the new Messiah of veganism.
A YEAR OF STREAK. Sir Pippin is crying with pride (sarcastically, of course).
NEUTRAL: One year of vegan streak documented permanently.

MOTIVATIONAL: Welcome back! Streaks that start from zero are the strongest.
Look who's back! The return is always more beautiful than the fall.
Back in the race! The one who returns always goes further than before.
What joy! We're not mad, we're PROUD you're back.
Hey! You came back. And that, my friend, is what matters most.
SARCASTIC: Look who's back. Sir Pippin was about to delete you.
Oh! You decided to come back. Well, welcome back, traitor.
Look at you, you resurrected. Sir Pippin had bags packed to leave, but okay.
Um! Someone remembered the app exists. Welcome back, nomad.
You're back. Sir Pippin is confused but surprisingly happy.
NEUTRAL: Welcome back. Streak restarted from day 1.
Back in the race. Day 1 restarted.

MOTIVATIONAL: Hey! You still have time to do your check-in today. Your streak is waiting.
Reminder: there's still time today. Your streak won't take care of itself, but Sir Pippin reminded you.
A gentle reminder: today's check-in is missing. Let's go!
Psst! Don't forget your check-in today. The streak is waiting.
Friendly reminder: your check-in today can still be done. Come on!
SARCASTIC: Hey. Are you going to do the check-in today or are we just staring at each other?
Reminder: your streak doesn't take care of itself. In case you didn't know.
Forgot? Sir Pippin's here to remind you that you STILL can do it.
Hi. Check-in. Today. Now. Or tomorrow you cry.
Hey, are you busy? Because your streak isn't. It's waiting.
NEUTRAL: Notice: your daily check-in can still be completed.
Notification: today's check-in not yet recorded.
Reminder: active streak requires daily check-in.

MOTIVATIONAL: ALERT! Your %d-day streak is about to end. You can still save it.
WARNING! You haven't checked in for over 24 hours. %d days are at risk. GET IN NOW!
EMERGENCY! Your %d-day streak hangs by a thread. Last chance to save it.
Last chance to save your %d-day streak. Get in now!
SARCASTIC: All that effort just to quit now? You've got %d days on the line. Think about it.
Sir Pippin is sending you this crying: %d days on streak. Almost nothing.
Look at you, about to throw %d days of consistency out the window. What a move.
Your %d-day streak is screaming. Will you let it die?
NEUTRAL: Alert: %d days on streak at risk. Check-in pending for over 24 hours.
Critical notification: urgent check-in needed. %d days at risk.
Critical status: %d-day streak requires immediate check-in.

MOTIVATIONAL: Plate assembled! Smart and balanced combination. Sir Pippin approves.
Excellent choice! This plate has everything you need. Nutrition at its best.
Very good! You just put together an AMAZING plate. Your body will thank you.
YES! That plate is a nutritional masterpiece. Sir Pippin is proud.
SARCASTIC: You built the plate. Sir Pippin approves (but it could improve).
Look at you, Chef. You built something that almost looks like food.
You built something. It's called a plate. Sir Pippin accepts it.
Is that a plate? Well, if you say so, Sir Pippin will trust you.
NEUTRAL: Plate assembled and saved. Macros processed.

MOTIVATIONAL: WEEKLY PLANNER COMPLETED! You're a MEAL-PREP GENIUS!
BRAVO! Your whole week is planned. Sir Pippin is impressed.
YES! Full week planned. That's true vegan discipline.
EPIC! Your weekly planner is done. You're ready to SUCCEED!
SARCASTIC: Look at you, you planned the week. How organized. Sir Pippin is emotional.
Full planner? Who are you? My mom?
Oh! A whole week completely planned. What a rare and beautiful thing.
Sir Pippin never thought he'd see it. A full week planned!
NEUTRAL: Your week is planned. Planning registered.
Weekly planner: ready for the week.
